Title: Projectile
Description: Launches a projectile that triggers child glyphs on collision

source.Label: Source
source.Description: Entity to launch the projectile from

direction.Label: Direction
direction.Description: Launch direction, defaults to source entity's look direction

gravity.Label: Gravity
gravity.Description: The amount that gravity affects the projectile

bounces.Label: Bounces
bounces.Description: The number of bounces the projectile will have

Next.Label: Next
Next.Description: The next glyph in the execution chain
